mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 320 in the CPIAUCSL series indicates central bank inaction, leading to elevated real interest rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 320.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in industrial production (INDPRO) and decrease in CPIAUCSL signals strong supply-side dynamics and disinflation, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction between INDPRO and CPIAUCSL fails to produce positive returns in > 40% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) during a supply shock regime signals reduced corporate earnings potential, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO declines by > 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) and low unemployment (UNRATE) indicates a tight labor market, driving corporate pricing power and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to generate positive returns in > 30% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in housing starts (HOUST) and retail sales (RSAFS) indicates robust demand conditions, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction between HOUST and RSAFS fails to produce positive returns in > 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening monetary policy (FEDFUNDS increase) paired with disinflation (CPIAUCSL decline) signals improved macroeconomic stability, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction between FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL fails to generate positive returns in > 35% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly expansion in GDP (GDPC1) reflects strong aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 40% of quarters where GDPC1 grows by > 1%.
